name: yt-companion-middleware
description: Middleware between Bitfocus Companion and the YouTube Live Streaming API

scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @app/web
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w @app/server && npm run typecheck:companion
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:gen-oauth && npm run build:all && electron packages/desktop/main.mjs
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:gen-oauth && npm run desktop:icons && npm run build:all && electron-builder --dir -c packages/desktop/electron-builder.yml
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:gen-oauth && npm run typecheck:electron && npm run desktop:icons && npm run build:all && electron-builder --win --publish never -c packages/desktop/electron-builder.yml
scripts.companion:package: npm --prefix companion-module install && npm --prefix companion-module run package
